description: RAG retrieval happy path: query about Tdap returns CDC-ACIP guideline chunk.
what_bug_this_catches: Regression where guideline_chunk source_type packets are rejected by the verifier instead of accepted as valid citations.

packets.label: Tdap adult booster
packets.value: Adults who have not received Tdap as adults should receive a one-time dose of Tdap.

claims.text: Per CDC-ACIP 2024, adults not previously vaccinated should receive a one-time Tdap dose.
